messages.subject: Possible source for usb-c charging
messages.body:
Hi,

I found your page about usb-c charging. We maintain an evidence-focused resource that may help as a source:
/en/data/usb-c-charging-data-1/

No paid placement or anchor text request is intended. If it is not useful, please ignore this note.
To opt out, reply with 'opt out' and this domain/email will be added to the suppression list.
Physical address must be configured before real sends.

Thanks.
